prompts.description: Guard ingredientCatalog.push with dedup check in fetchIngredientViaClaude
prompts.prompt:
In components/onboarding.tsx, inside the fetchIngredientViaClaude function, find the ingredientCatalog.push({...}) block (around line 803). Wrap ONLY the push call with a dedup guard. The result should look like:

```
if (!ingredientCatalog.some((item) => item.name === data.name)) {
  ingredientCatalog.push({
    name: data.name,
    category: data.category,
    calories: Number(data.calories) || 0,
    protein: Number(data.protein) || 0,
    carbs: Number(data.carbs) || 0,
    fat: Number(data.fat) || 0,
    cost: Number(data.cost) || 0,
  })
}
addIngredientFromSearch(data.name)
```

The addIngredientFromSearch(data.name) call must remain OUTSIDE the if block so it always runs.

Do NOT change any other line in the file. Do NOT modify app/api/claude-nutrition/route.ts or any other file. Do NOT refactor ingredientCatalog to useState.

Verify: npm run build passes with no TypeScript errors.
